body:
urfavgirl222:

I want to be eaten out so bad, I need to know how it feels. I want it to feel so good I start crying, I want to be the most vocal i’ve ever been, I want to make noises I didn’t even know were possible, I want my legs to be shaking uncontrollably, I want my brain to shut up and focus only on the immense amount of pleasure i’m finally experiencing.

One day…
